title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT SHOP THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Homeward Bound Pets Humane Society operates a thrift store to raise money to benefit its animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1120 NE Lafayette Avenue McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Tuesday/Thrusday-Saturday 10am-5pm Email (503) 472-0341 3 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-0341 ext 3 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln, Marion, Polk, Tillamook, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Tuesday/Thrusday-Saturday 10am-5pm Services: Donation Drop Off Points Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
